overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit alley, transitioning through an industrial underpass into a bright futuristic city center with towering skyscrapers, busy sidewalks, and ending with an ascent up outdoor stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit covered arcade with vending machines

events.description: exiting the vibrant neon-lit area into darker alleyway
moving from enclosed neon corridor to open back alley

agents.ego_description: walking through a neon-lit corridor past vending machines and small groups of people

notable_agents.action: group of people conversing near neon lights

entered.detail: horizontal magenta neon tubes on back wall
vertical cyan neon strips framing doorway
purple-lit vending machine with digital display
large circular ventilation fans on wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow enclosed corridor illuminated by vibrant magenta and cyan neon lights. The camera moves forward past a vending machine on the left and groups of standing NPCs, transitioning into a darker alleyway as the neon lights fade behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial covered walkway with metal support beams

events.description: approaching bright exit from dark underpass, sunlight becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial corridor toward the bright city exit

entered.detail: orange steel trusses supporting overhead structure
weathered concrete path with drainage grates

segments.scene_description: Walking through a semi-covered industrial walkway with concrete floors and orange steel support beams. The corridor features large ventilation units and glass skylights revealing towering skyscrapers above, gradually brightening as the exit approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: major city intersection with towering skyscrapers

events.description: exiting underpass into bright open city plaza with massive skyscrapers
turning left onto main sidewalk to follow the avenue

agents.ego_description: exiting the underpass and crossing the open plaza toward the sidewalk, turning left to follow the street

notable_agents.action: black car driving along the avenue

entered.detail: cluster of futuristic glass and steel mega-towers with corporate logos
raised concrete roadway with support pillars

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into a vast sunlit plaza surrounded by colossal glass skyscrapers. The camera crosses the open area toward the sidewalk, passing palm trees and digital billboards, then turns left to follow the busy avenue with moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with outdoor dining

events.description: vehicle passes by on the right side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the crowded sidewalk past outdoor cafes and construction barriers

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket walking ahead
white van driving down the street

entered.detail: white umbrellas and plastic chairs on blue carpet
yellow and black striped barriers blocking building entrance
enclosed walkway connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: Proceeding along the busy downtown sidewalk with pedestrians walking in the same direction. Outdoor cafe seating with white umbrellas lines the left side behind construction barriers, while vehicles pass on the right. Overhead pedestrian bridges span between the towering buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor staircase leading to upper city level

events.description: beginning ascent up wide outdoor staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide outdoor staircase toward the upper pedestrian level

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair ascending stairs ahead

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with teal painted handrails
covered bridge connecting buildings at top of stairs

segments.scene_description: Approaching and ascending a wide outdoor staircase with distinctive teal handrails. Other pedestrians move up and down the stairs as the camera climbs toward an upper-level pedestrian walkway, with the massive skyscrapers visible ahead against the morning sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, neon-lit corridor into the expansive, sun-drenched heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by moving through a narrow passage bathed in magenta and cyan light, passing a vending machine and groups of people before the colors fade into a darker, industrial alleyway. As the camera proceeds, the environment shifts into a semi-covered walkway of concrete and orange steel, where glass skylights gradually reveal the towering skyscrapers above. The scene then opens wide as the camera emerges from the underpass into a vast, sunlit plaza, crossing past palm trees and digital billboards toward a busy downtown avenue lined with outdoor cafes and overhead pedestrian bridges. Finally, the movement turns toward a wide outdoor staircase with teal handrails, ascending toward an upper-level walkway as the massive city skyline looms against a bright morning sky.
